channel.title: Yorkshire Experiences Events
channel.description: Upcoming Yorkshire events in the Experiences category.

item.title: Outdoor Yoga at Potteric Carr Nature Reserve
item.description: Join us at Potteric Carr throughout the beautiful summer months for relaxing morning yoga sessions with Boho Warrior Yoga.
item.dc:creator: Yorkshire Wildlife Trust

item.title: ‘Some Steel’: Sculpture and Steel in Britain, 1960-90
item.dc:creator: Visit Leeds

item.title: An Evening of Love, Sex and Scandal at Temple Newsam
item.dc:creator: Visit Leeds

item.title: In The Picture: Objects in Focus
item.dc:creator: Visit Leeds

item.title: Botanically Beautiful: Art and design inspired by nature
item.dc:creator: Visit Leeds

item.title: Address
item.description: See the Tower of Now, Saad Qureshi’s 15-metre sculpture at Hall Ings, Bradford, celebrating the city’s diversity and cultural heritage.
item.location: Hall Ings, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 5SD
item.ify:location: Hall Ings, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 5SD
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Waves of Waste beach clean at Scarborough North (Multiple Dates)
item.description: Join our Waves of Waste co-ordinators as they give Scarborough North beach a thorough tidy up to protect marine wildlife.
item.dc:creator: Yorkshire Wildlife Trust

item.title: The Pussycat Dolls – PCD Forever Tour
item.dc:creator: Visit Leeds

item.title: Lotherton Hall: A Historic Tour of Yorkshire’s Edwardian Gem
item.location: Lotherton Hall: A Historic Tour of Yorkshire’s Edwardian Gem 19th March 2026 - 17th September 2026
item.ify:location: Lotherton Hall: A Historic Tour of Yorkshire’s Edwardian Gem 19th March 2026 - 17th September 2026
item.dc:creator: Visit Leeds

item.title: Waves of Waste beach clean at Scarborough South (Multiple Dates)
item.description: Join our Waves of Waste co-ordinators as they give Scarborough South beach a thorough tidy up to protect marine wildlife.
item.dc:creator: Yorkshire Wildlife Trust

item.title: Waves of Waste beach clean at Filey South (Multiple Dates)
item.description: Join our Waves of Waste co-ordinators as they give Filey South beach a thorough tidy up to protect marine wildlife.
item.dc:creator: Yorkshire Wildlife Trust

item.title: The Mos Eisley Cantina Open Mic Night
item.dc:creator: Visit Leeds

item.title: Waves of Waste beach clean at Fraisthorpe (Multiple Dates)
item.description: Join our Waves of Waste co-ordinators as they give Fraisthorpe beach a thorough tidy up to protect marine wildlife.
item.dc:creator: Yorkshire Wildlife Trust

item.title: Lines of Enquiry: Drawings from the Collection
item.dc:creator: Visit Leeds

item.title: Leeds: Self-Guided City Walk & Interactive Exploration Game
item.dc:creator: Visit Leeds

item.title: Address
item.description: At Bradford Industrial Museum, Made by Many Hands highlights local craft traditions inspired by the Heritage Crafts list and is accompanied by workshops and events across the site.
item.location: Bradford Industrial Museum, Moorside Road, Eccleshill, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD2 3HP
item.ify:location: Bradford Industrial Museum, Moorside Road, Eccleshill, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD2 3HP
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Waves of Waste beach clean at Flamborough (Multiple Dates)
item.description: Join our Waves of Waste co-ordinators as they give South Landing beach a thorough tidy up to protect marine wildlife.
item.dc:creator: Yorkshire Wildlife Trust

item.title: Sector Safari
item.description: Sector Safari is an exciting careers trail around the city centre giving you the chance to explore career sectors and jobs locally.
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: The Watchers of York: Sculpture Trail
item.dc:creator: Visit York

item.title: Busy Bee Trail
item.description: Buzzzz, do you hear that? The bees are out collecting nectar to make honey. Follow the trail around Staveley and become a bee for the day.
item.dc:creator: Yorkshire Wildlife Trust

item.title: Tropical Treasures Trail
item.description: Follow the flutter, swing and squawk along the Tropical Treasures trail!
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Wildlife Photography for Beginners at Staveley Nature Reserve
item.description: Join our resident photographer for a wildlife photography for beginners workshop.
item.dc:creator: Yorkshire Wildlife Trust

item.title: Summer Holiday Activities at Sheffield Manor Lodge – Week 1
item.description: Come along to Sheffield Manor Lodge during the first week of the summer holidays and enjoy fun garden-themed craft and trail activities!
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Matthew Bourne's The Car Man
item.description: Fasten your seat belts. Matthew Bourne’s award-winning The Car Man is back! Loosely based on Bizet’s ever-popular opera, The Car Man has one of the most thrilling and instantly recognisable scores in New Adventures’ repertoire.
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Grow with Pride
item.description: Celebrate Pride with a fun, nature-inspired drop-in activity at Gibson Mill.
item.location: Hardcastle Crags, Hebden Bridge, West Yorkshire
item.ify:location: Hardcastle Crags, Hebden Bridge, West Yorkshire
item.dc:creator: National Trust Yorkshire

item.title: Summer of Play: Free entry day
item.description: Kickstart your summer with a fun filled day out at East Riddlesden Hall.
item.location: East Riddlesden Hall, Keighley, West Yorkshire
item.ify:location: East Riddlesden Hall, Keighley, West Yorkshire
item.dc:creator: National Trust Yorkshire

item.title: The Fabric of East Riddlesden: Inspiration from the Hall and its grounds
item.description: Discover this new exhibition by Textilia 3, using the hall, history, past inhabitants and landscape as their inspiration to create beautiful artworks.
item.location: East Riddlesden Hall, Keighley, West Yorkshire
item.ify:location: East Riddlesden Hall, Keighley, West Yorkshire
item.dc:creator: National Trust Yorkshire

item.title: Summer of Play at Wentworth Castle Gardens
item.description: Summer of Play is back! Join us for another adventure-filled summer, every day throughout the holidays. With a fairytale castle, secret gardens and plenty of space to explore, Wentworth Castle Gardens is the perfect setting for your Summer of Play.
item.location: Wentworth Castle Gardens, Barnsley, South Yorkshire
item.ify:location: Wentworth Castle Gardens, Barnsley, South Yorkshire
item.dc:creator: National Trust Yorkshire

item.title: Orienteering at Wentworth Castle Gardens
item.description: We've teamed up with South Yorkshire Orienteers so you can give orienteering a go any day of the year at Wentworth Castle Gardens.
item.location: Wentworth Castle Gardens, Barnsley, South Yorkshire
item.ify:location: Wentworth Castle Gardens, Barnsley, South Yorkshire
item.dc:creator: National Trust Yorkshire

item.title: Summer of Play: Family trail
item.description: Let Dart the Dragonfly lead your adventures in the gardens at Beningbrough this summer.
item.location: Beningbrough, York, North Yorkshire
item.ify:location: Beningbrough, York, North Yorkshire
item.dc:creator: National Trust Yorkshire

item.title: Hidden City Centre Explore
item.description: A walking tour of Sheffield city centre history.
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Woodwork Taster Session
item.description: Interested in learning some woodworking skills in Sheffield? In July, Ed’s Workshop is running beginner-friendly evening woodwork taster sessions. Small classes (maximum 6 people), plenty of hands-on guidance in a welcoming workshop environment.
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Amnesty Letter Writing Session
item.description: Join Amnesty Sheffield’s monthly letter-writing session, standing up for human rights one letter at a time. It's free to join and no Amnesty membership required!
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: I Saw the TV Glow
item.description: Teenager Owen is just trying to make it through life in the suburbs when his classmate introduces him to a mysterious late-night TV show — a vision of a supernatural world beneath their own.
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Park Hill Tours - Walk the Streets in the Sky
item.description: Explore a brutalist icon and its bold reinvention
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Superbugs!
item.description: Something strange is happening in the woods! Join Professor Bug’s Superbug training to go on bug hunts, build giant webs, create superbug disguises, and help bring the buzz back to the woodland.
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: ADHD, Mindfulness and Burnout: Speaker and Networking
item.description: Featuring speaker Camilla, we'll explore challenges, strengths and how you can prevent burnout an manage ADHD symptoms through mindfulness with opportunities to network.
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Tom Jones
item.description: Tom Jones + STONE FOUNDATION Music icon Tom Jones has announced his return to Halifax this summer for a huge outdoor headline show as part of his 2026 Come Gather Round tour. The legendary Welsh singer will take to the stage at TK Maxx Presents Live at The Piece Hall on Saturday 25 July. He... \n
item.location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE
item.ify:location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE
item.dc:creator: The Piece Hall

item.title: Address
item.description: Catch the all‑new Be Like Blippi Tour live at Bradford Live, bringing Blippi and Meekah to the stage for an interactive family adventure.
item.location: Bradford Live, 1 Thornton Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 2EP
item.ify:location: Bradford Live, 1 Thornton Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 2EP
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: With clues, pirate songs and plenty of swashbuckling adventure, Fireman Sam's new live show at St. George's Hall is perfect for all budding pirates!
item.location: St Georges Hall, Bridge Street, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1JT
item.ify:location: St Georges Hall, Bridge Street, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1JT
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Become a little archaeologist as you dig to uncover Roman or Viking clues — a fun, educational family activity at Bolling Hall Museum.
item.location: Bolling Hall, Bowling Hall Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD4 7LP
item.ify:location: Bolling Hall, Bowling Hall Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD4 7LP
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Topic Folk Club welcomes a pair of brilliant musicians
item.location: Wallers Bar, Millergate, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1SX
item.ify:location: Wallers Bar, Millergate, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1SX
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: bradford@napoleons-casinos.co.uk
item.location: Napoleons Casino & Restaurant, Bradford, Bolton Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 4DR
item.ify:location: Napoleons Casino & Restaurant, Bradford, Bolton Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 4DR
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Gary Numan
item.description: Gary Numan + LADYTRON Electronic music pioneer, celebrated songwriter and globally renowned musician Gary Numan will headline TK Maxx presents Live at The Piece Hall on Friday 31 July, joined by special guests Ladytron. Tickets on sale now via ticketmaster.co.uk TICKETS General Admission – Access to general courtyard a
item.location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE

item.dc:creator: The Piece Hall

item.title: Address
item.description: A fantastic night of music and song to celebrate Yorkshire Day in proper Yorkshire style at St. George's Hall.
item.location: St Georges Hall, Bridge Street, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1JT
item.ify:location: St Georges Hall, Bridge Street, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1JT
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Experience the rich colours of classic Technicolor cinema on the big screen at Pictureville, with a season of Hollywood favourites spanning adventure, romance, musicals and psychological drama.
item.location: Pictureville and Cubby Broccoli Cinemas, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1NQ
item.ify:location: Pictureville and Cubby Broccoli Cinemas, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1NQ
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Fans can expect a powerful sweep of classic and cosmic Hawkwind music at Bradford Live.
item.location: Bradford Live, 1 Thornton Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 2EP
item.ify:location: Bradford Live, 1 Thornton Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 2EP
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Join Samantha Yates, stained glass artist and conservator, for an exclusive full day workshop creating your own bespoke leaded glass panel in the Heritage Craft Room at Bradford Industrial Museum.
item.location: Bradford Industrial Museum, Heritage Craft Room, Moorside Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD2 3HP
item.ify:location: Bradford Industrial Museum, Heritage Craft Room, Moorside Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD2 3HP
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: The K’s
item.description: The K\'s + TOM A. SMITH & LADY OF MARS Explosive indie rockers The K’s are returning to Halifax next summer for their first ever headline show at TK Maxx presents Live at The Piece Hall on Saturday 8 August. They will be joined by special guests Tom A. Smith and Lady of Mars. Tickets... \n
item.location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE

item.title: Address
item.description: Bring an old T-shirt to Bradford Industrial Museum and transform it into a unique fashion statement in this fun family upcycling workshop inspired by the exhibition Made by Many Hands.
item.location: Bradford Industrial Museum, Moorside Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD2 3HP
item.ify:location: Bradford Industrial Museum, Moorside Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD2 3HP
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Celebrate summer at Cartwright Hall Art Gallery with an afternoon/evening of nature-inspired activities, creative workshops and family-friendly fun, all set within the beautiful surroundings of Lister Park and Cartwright Hall.
item.location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.ify:location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Build, climb and explore at MORPHOSIS in Wibsey Park, then discover more Nature Season adventures with Explore West Yorkshire.
item.location: Wibsey Park, Wibsey Park Avenue, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD6 3QD
item.ify:location: Wibsey Park, Wibsey Park Avenue, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD6 3QD
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: The Wombats
item.description: The Wombats + CIRCA WAVES, CHERYHOLT & THE CAYMANS Indie giants The Wombats are headlining what promises to be another unforgettable celebration in Halifax next summer. Fresh from the release of their acclaimed sixth studio album Oh! The Ocean, and a huge headline tour that’s seen them play arenas across the globe – th
item.location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE

item.title: Hollywood Vampires
item.description: Hollywood Vampires + THE DAMNED American rock supergroup Hollywood Vampires will headline TK Maxx presents Live at The Piece Hall on Saturday 22 August. Their first live shows in almost three years, Alice Cooper, Johnny Depp, Joe Perry and Tommy Henriksen will be joined by special guests The Damned. TICKETS General Adm
item.location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE

item.dc:creator: The Piece Hall

item.title: Heritage Tours
item.description: Heritage Tours are back for summer 2026 Over its almost 250-year history, The Piece Hall has been home to the weird, the wonderful & the fantastical. Experience a guided tour with one of our knowledgeable heritage guides who will lead you around the grand colonnades and delve deeper into The Piece Hall’s captivating pa
item.location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE
